Idol of Rallos Zek  
 

Quest Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: WAR SHD BRD SHM BER
Race: ALL except ERU HIE DWF IKS VAH DRK
Deity: Rallos Zek
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Quest Item Placeable

This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

As of 8/14/01 this Idol is still bugged and not usable by SK's of Rallos. Maybe they fixed it on the 15th, but I have not been in game to check. Anyone on Tholuxe wanting one can send me a tell.

Kyreea, Shaman
Rhyana, Druid

Jeez
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 11:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762915502
10 posts
These imbued/deity specific items are starting to make me wish I hadnt made my warrior agnostic. This isn't really too great, but +5 str does help. There is also alot of nice imbued jewelry and stuff. D**n agnosticism!!!!
▲ Page top
Held
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 1:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763084464
1 post
Held meens it fits into either of your hands, and this item happens to also fit into your range slot. But only ammo goes in the ammo slot.

Just my 2cp

well concidering your a palidan and i've never met a palidan who's god was rallos zek i dont think you can equip this anyways. i could be wrong though since i dont play a pali and actualy never looked into what gods they could follow , it just would seem odd that a holy fighter would serve the god of war

What the "Held" slot is...
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 2:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750605686
55 posts
As I understand it, the "Held" slot means that it can go in the ammo slot, even if it is not ammo. =)

Jarochai Alabaster
32nd Dwarven Cleric of Brell

__DEL__1592248306816
7 posts

so

# Jul 10 2001 at 10:27 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous
does this mean you can put it in 12 different slots giving you +60 str? =p
▲ Page top
RE: so
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 9:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Range primary secondary. Just like the picture says. I guess you could hold 3, but then what would you hit with? Slap em with your clay Idol. My experience with fishing poles leads me to believe you probably can't even fight hand-to-hand with these in your melee slots. Guess you could carry more loot to town, or use while smithing for the strength bonus.
